name: 5p15_2_ADAMTS16_region
description: 5p15.2 region containing ADAMTS16 (a-disintegrin-and-metalloproteinase-with-thrombospondin-motifs paralog of ADAMTS18/20). Short intragenic SDs and cross-chromosome paralog tracts (ADAMTS18 on 16q23, ADAMTS20 on 12q12) at 60-75% protein identity. Listed as a CNV polymorphism region in DGV.

architecture.internal_structure: Short intragenic SDs ~5-15 kb in ADAMTS16 introns; cross-chromosome paralog tracts (ADAMTS16 <-> ADAMTS18/20) at 60-75% protein identity; rare CNVs in DGV.
